omitted_declarations.policy_reference: We may disclose your enquiry data to one or more of our authorized resellers (identified on our website https://www.avenza.com/about/resellers/) for the purpose of enabling them to contact you so that they can offer, market and sell to you relevant goods and/or services. Each such third party will act as a data controller in relation to the enquiry data that we supply to it; and upon contacting you, each such third party will supply to you a copy of its own privacy policy, which will govern that third party's use of your personal data.
